async fn handle_upload(data: Vec<u8>) -> String {
    let parsed = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
        let s = std::str::from_utf8(&data).unwrap();
        let mut lines: Vec<&str> = s.lines().collect();
        lines.sort();
        (lines.len(), lines[0].to_string())
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();
    format!("sorted {} lines, first: {}", parsed.0, parsed.1)
}

async fn fetch_and_process(url: &str) -> Result<String, reqwest::Error> {
    let body = reqwest::get(url).await?.text().await?;
    let lines: Vec<&str> = body.lines().collect();
    Ok(format!("got {} lines", lines.len()))
}

async fn log_to_file(path: &str, msg: &str) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    let path = path.to_string();
    let msg = msg.to_string();
    tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
        use std::io::Write;
        let mut f = std::fs::OpenOptions::new()
            .create(true)
            .append(true)
            .open(&path)?;
        writeln!(f, "{msg}")?;
        Ok::<(), std::io::Error>(())
    })
    .await
    .unwrap()
}
